reason: ru=32 chars exceeds ~28 limit; trimmed abbreviations preserve physical/rank senses and the distinction from 涨 (market) and 提高 (intentional raise)
en=30 chars exceeds limit; 'measurable' preserves the quantitative sense that distinguishes 下降 from 衰退 (gradual decay)
en=30 chars; 'neg.' abbreviation dropped but experiential shade still explicit, preserving distinction from 未 (not yet, literary)
ru=31, en=29 chars both exceed limit; 'офиц.' and 'formal only' retain the written/official register that distinguishes 不良 from colloquial 坏
en=30 chars; 'N. dialect' (northern dialect) preserves the distinction from 个子 (general spoken) and 身高 (formal measured)
ru=29 chars; condensed while keeping both 'mainly' and 'priority' senses matching cedict 'rely mainly on / attach most importance to'
ru=31 chars; 'абстрактные условия' preserves the abstract (non-physical) sense that distinguishes 之下 from 地下 (physical underground)
ru=30 chars; literary register marker retained, preserving distinction from 以内 (quantitative) and 之中 (spatial/literary)

Both fields inaccurately narrowed to 'stamina/endurance' contradicting cedict 'physical strength/power'; corrected to match cedict while keeping a secondary endurance shade. Also ru=23 chars (original was 23 but semantically wrong)
ru=30, en=29 chars both exceed limit; 'пасс.' and 'as rider' preserve the passenger distinction from 骑车 (straddle/cycle) and 乘坐 (formal)
en=29 chars; 'pastoral' alone captures the cultural/pastoral framing that distinguishes 乡村 from 农村 (farming/administrative)
en=30 chars; 'with transfer' retains the ownership/responsibility-transfer sense that distinguishes 交给 from 递给 (physical pass, no transfer)
ru=30, en=29 chars both exceed limit; institutional context preserved, distinguishing from general 付 and obligatory-dues 缴纳
ru=35, en=30 chars both exceed limit; 'источник' and 'therefrom' preserve the source-of-action sense that distinguishes 从中 from anaphoric 其中 and spatial 当中
en=31 chars; dropping 'invest/' keeps abstract expenditure sense distinguishing from momentary 使劲 (exert force now)
en=29 chars; 'morph.' abbreviation for 'morpheme' brings it to 27 chars while preserving the bound-morpheme shade distinguishing 价 from standalone 价钱/价格
en=29 chars; 'gang' covers the bunch/group sense; retains partner and colloquial marker, distinguishing from formal 群体 and intimate 伴侣
ru=30 chars; explicit sound/news restriction preserved, distinguishing 传来 from physical-movement verbs 进来, 上来, 回来
en=31 chars; 'norm' replaces 'standard' (saves 4 chars) and retains the formal-register shade distinguishing 依照 from neutral 按照 and evidential 据
ru=29 chars; 'сбыт' (sales/distribution) is a tighter synonym for 'продажи' here, preserving commercial distinction from non-commercial 推广
en=33 chars; '(conc.)' abbreviation dropped — the meaning itself already conveys the concessive/contrariwise shade distinguishing 倒是 from 反倒 and 相反
en=31 chars; 'mid-action' preserves the abrupt/resultative sense distinguishing 停下 from formal 停止 and temporary 暂停
en=31 chars; core meaning retained; 'stop over; linger' at 17 chars preserves the travel-pause sense distinguishing from 待 (hang around) and 留下 (stay/leave behind)
EN is 30 chars (over ~28). Suggested: 'one after another (ordered)' = 28 chars, which also makes the ordered-sequence shade explicit for the must_distinguish.

RU is 30 chars (over ~28). Suggested: 'заяц/кролик (в сложн. словах)' = 29 — still borderline; tighter: 'кролик/заяц (книжн.)' = 20 chars, preserving the literary/compound register that distinguishes it from 兔子.
EN is 31 chars (over ~28). Suggested: 'kilogram (colloquial spoken)' = 27 chars, preserving the spoken-vs-SI distinction from 千克.

RU is 34 chars (significantly over) and EN is 29 chars (over). RU suggested: 'растить; держать (животн./детей)' = 31 — still long; better: 'воспитывать; держать животных' = 29; best: 'растить/держать (общ.)' = 21 chars. EN suggested: 'raise (child/pet, general)' = 26 chars.

RU is 31 chars and EN is 30 chars (both over ~28). Both must preserve the dual sense: emit + brave/risk, which distinguishes 冒 from 发出/排放/放射. RU suggested: 'испускать (дым/пар); рисковать' = 29 — still borderline; 'дымить/парить; рисковать' = 23. EN suggested: 'emit (smoke/steam); take a risk' = 31 — still long; 'emit/give off; brave danger' = 26 chars.
RU is 31 chars (over ~28). Distinction from 缓解/缓和 (measurable decrease) is preserved in EN. RU suggested: 'облегчить нагрузку/тяжесть' = 26 chars.
RU is 31 chars (over ~28). The must_distinguish shade (internal motivation vs neutral cause 由于) must survive. Suggested: 'из побуждения; по мотиву' = 23 chars.

RU is 30 chars and EN is 29 chars (both over ~28). The must_distinguish shade (very start vs early 早期) must be preserved. RU suggested: 'начальный период (старт)' = 23 chars. EN suggested: 'initial/opening stage' = 21 chars.

RU is 32 chars (over ~28). The must_distinguish shade (abstract arrival of events/seasons vs physical arrival) must survive. Suggested: 'приход; наступление (событий)' = 29 — borderline; 'наступление событий/эпохи' = 25 chars.
RU is 30 chars (over ~28). Must preserve 'any country' shade vs 华裔 (born abroad) and 华侨 (retains citizenship). Suggested: 'этнич. китаец (любой страны)' = 28 chars.

RU is 34 chars and EN is 34 chars (both significantly over ~28). Must distinguish from 合同 (legally binding) and 通知书 (one-way notice). RU suggested: 'соглашение (не только юрид.)' = 27 chars. EN suggested: 'written agreement (informal ok)' = 31 — still long; 'agreement (may be informal)' = 27 chars.
EN is 31 chars (over ~28). Must distinguish from 南部 (administrative portion of specific territory). Suggested: 'the South (cultural region)' = 27 chars.
Semantic error: «послепослезавтрашний год» conflates day-scale (послезавтра = day after tomorrow) with year-scale; 后年 means 'the year after next', not a day reference.
35 chars, exceeds limit. New form preserves the three-way adj/adv/noun distinction critical for telling it apart from 也许 (pure adverb) and 说不定.
35 chars, exceeds limit. Core shade (state/condition, abstract) is preserved and still distinguishes from 在场 (present at a physical scene).
34 chars, exceeds limit. Trimmed; the must_distinguish note already handles contrast with 响亮 (loud and clear).
33 chars, exceeds limit. Shortened while keeping the 'on the scene' sense that distinguishes it from 处在 (be in a state).
33 chars, exceeds limit. Admin register marker retained; compressed abbreviation.
32 chars, exceeds limit. 'Все сферы' preserves the must_distinguish shade vs. 明星 (entertainment only).
meaning_ru was 32 chars (exceeds limit); meaning_en was 29 chars. Both trimmed. The morpheme/bound-form nature is now signalled only in meaning_en; must_distinguish note carries the full context.
meaning_ru 31 chars, meaning_en 31 chars — both exceed limit. New forms preserve the must_distinguish shade: 哥 = any elder brother; 大哥 = the eldest specifically.
31 chars, exceeds limit. Trimmed; sensory-event shade (sound reached you) that distinguishes from 听到 is preserved.
31 chars, exceeds limit. Shortened; bound-form and measure-word dual role (critical for must_distinguish vs 声音) retained.
meaning_ru 30 chars, meaning_en 29 chars — both exceed/border limit. Trimmed; cross-reference to 右边 retained for the must_distinguish pair.
30 chars, exceeds limit. Shortened; size/amount sense preserved, distinguishing it from 扩大 (scope) and 放大 (magnification).
30 chars, exceeds limit. Trimmed to 23 chars; outerwear category label retained, distinguishing from 羽绒服 (down jacket specifically).
29 chars, borderline. Abbreviated to 27 chars; the concessive register marker (уступ.) that distinguishes from neutral 仅仅 is kept.
29 chars, borderline. Trimmed to 22 chars; cross-reference to 右 retained for the must_distinguish pair.
29 chars, borderline. 'Colloquial locative' compressed to 17 chars; colloquial register marker retained, distinguishing from neutral 外面 and formal 之外.
29 chars, borderline. Trimmed to 22 chars; colloquial register marker retained, distinguishing from neutral 后面.
29 chars, borderline. Trimmed to 26 chars; 'от руки' (hand-drawn) preserves the must_distinguish shade vs 图片 (photo/digital image) and 图 (diagram/chart).
29 chars, borderline. Trimmed to 21 chars; 'подпольный' (clandestine/underground) covers both senses in cedict; must_distinguish shade vs 之下 (abstract hierarchy) is preserved.
29 chars, borderline. Trimmed to 26 chars; 'multiple types' retains the quantity-of-types emphasis that distinguishes from 各种 (all kinds, covering each type).

Both fields exceed ~28 chars (len_ru=33, len_en=33). Shortened while keeping the negative edge needed to distinguish 大胆 from 勇于 (positive courage) and 豪迈 (heroic character). New len_ru=33 — still too long; use: 'смелый; дерзкий' (16) and 'bold; audacious (can be reckless)' (33 — still long). Correct forms: meaning_ru='смелый; дерзкий' and meaning_en='bold; daring (can be reckless)'.

Both original fields exceed ~28 chars (len_ru=33, len_en=33). These replacements are 16 and 29 chars respectively. The 'reckless' note preserves the must_distinguish shade vs. 勇于 (positive admirable courage) and 豪迈 (heroic character).
Original len_en=29 ('girl; female student (school)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 25 chars and retains the school context that distinguishes 女生 from 女孩儿 (neutral/any age) and 少女 (literary teen).

Original len_en=31 ('just like (literary; ≠ "seems")') exceeds limit. The '≠ seems' gloss targets 好像 which is not in must_distinguish. Replacement (28 chars) keeps the literary/formal register that distinguishes 如同 from the colloquial verb 像.
Original len_ru=31 ('младшая сестра (в составе слов)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 24 chars and preserves the morpheme-only nature that distinguishes 妹 from freestanding 妹妹.

Original len_en=32 ('wife (neutral, standard written)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 28 chars and retains the neutral/written register that distinguishes 妻子 from casual 老婆, polite-formal 太太, and honorific 夫人.
Original len_ru=30, len_en=31, both exceed limit. 'морфема' (24 chars) and 'in compounds' (27 chars) preserve the bound-morpheme distinction from freestanding 姐姐 while fitting the button.

Original len_en=31 ('character; letter (single unit)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 25 chars. The 'single unit' qualifier is implied by everyday usage of 字 and the distinction from 词 (multi-char word) and 文字 (writing system) remains clear from the basic gloss.

Original len_ru=31, len_en=31, both exceed limit. Replacements are 16 and 23 chars. 'морфема'/'bound morpheme' preserves the must_distinguish contrast: 季 is a morpheme in compounds (季度, 四季) while 季节 is the standalone word for season.

Original len_en=32 ('serene (atmosphere/surroundings)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 28 chars. 'environment; poetic' preserves the key distinction from 平静 (neutral mood/state) and 安宁 (freedom from disturbance).

Original len_ru=32 ('искать; добиваться (абстр. цели)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 27 chars. '(абстр.)' retains the abstract-goal nuance that distinguishes 寻求 from 搜索 (physical/internet scan) and 寻找 (concrete target).

Original len_en=29 ('about to; will soon (written)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 24 chars. 'about to happen' conveys the near-future imminence (like 快要) that distinguishes 将要 from the plain future marker 将; '(formal)' retains the written-register note.

Original len_ru=33 ('малыш (ласк., взрослый — ребёнку)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 22 chars. 'ласк.' (warm) and 'к детям' (to/for children) preserve the adult-to-child warmth that distinguishes 小朋友 from neutral 孩子 and formal 儿童.

Original len_ru=32, len_en=30, both exceed limit. New len_ru=32 — still over. Use meaning_ru='ведомство; раунд (сч.)' (21 chars) — situation is recoverable from the must_distinguish context. len_en='bureau; round (cl.)' (19 chars). Both preserve the classifier and bureau senses central to distinguishing 局 from 全局 and 局势.

Original len_ru=32, len_en=30 both exceed ~28 chars. Replacements are 22 and 19 chars. The three core senses (bureau/office, game-round classifier, situation) collapse to the two most button-distinguishable; 'situation' is a secondary morpheme sense covered by the must_distinguish note on 局势.

Original len_ru=31 ('устойчивый; ровный (без колеб.)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 25 chars. 'без колебаний' (no fluctuation) preserves the must_distinguish contrast: 平稳 = stable/no fluctuation, 顺利 = smooth without obstacles.

Original len_en=32 ('storehouse (morpheme, compounds)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 27 chars and retains the bound-morpheme role that distinguishes single-char 库 (used as suffix in 图书库, 数据库) from standalone 仓库.

Original len_en=33 ('drive; spur (one propels another)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 27 chars. 'ripple effect' captures the cause-and-pull mechanics that distinguish 带动 from 启动 (launch/initiate a process) and 动力 (noun: driving force).

Original len_en=30 ('carry (a slight tinge/quality)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 22 chars. 'slight tinge' preserves the partial/incidental nature that distinguishes 带有 from 拥有 (fully own/possess) and 占有 (occupy with control).

Original len_en=30 ('construct (physical structure)') exceeds limit. Replacement is 26 chars. 'physical structure' retains the must_distinguish contrast: 建造 = physical building process vs. 建成 (result/completed), 建设 (societal/economic development), 建立 (found organizations/systems).

Original len_en=29 ('bring in from outside; import') exceeds limit. Replacement is 28 chars. 'from abroad' preserves the external-source distinction that separates 引进 (technology/talent from outside) from 介绍 (introduce a person or concept to an audience).

meaning_ru 'в этот момент (нарратив, письм.)' is 32 chars. Drop 'письм.' (redundant with нарратив): 'в этот момент (нарратив)' = 25 chars. meaning_en 'at this moment (narrative)' is 26 chars — passes.

meaning_en 'damp; excessively moist' omits the primary cedict/dataset sense 'tide'. Both meaning_ru and meaning_en must include the core 'tide' sense. Rewritten to cover both; each ≤28 chars and still preserves the moisture shade needed for the must_distinguish with 潮湿.

meaning_ru len=29 exceeds 28; replace 'зрелище' with 'спектакль'? No, that's longer. Use 'смотреть (матч, шоу, концерт)' = 28; meaning_en=30 exceeds 28: 'watch (show/event)' = 18, but keep register nuance — 'watch a show/match' = 19

ru=31 en=29 both exceed ~28. Parentheticals trimmed while preserving the noun/role distinction needed to separate 负责人 from verb 负责.
ru=31 exceeds ~28. 'возмещать ущерб; торг. в убыток' shortened to 'возмещать; работать в убыток' (28). Both senses (compensate + sell at a loss) preserved for must_distinguish.
ru=31 exceeds ~28. Abbreviation 'класс.' → 'кл.' brings it to 28. Both senses (reward + admire) preserved for must_distinguish vs 欣赏/佩服.
ru=29 exceeds ~28. 'в т.ч.' replaced by 'вкл.' to reach 27 chars. Cargo/freight nuance retained for must_distinguish vs 百货/商品/产品/物资.
en=32 exceeds ~28. 'trust, title, victory' → 'trust, victory' (25) still signals the verb takes an object, distinguishing it from 赢 (just win) and 获奖/中奖.
en=29 exceeds ~28. 'in nature' → 'nature' saves 3 chars (26). The substance/nature signal distinguishing 转化 from reversible 转换 (modes/channels) is preserved.
ru=32 exceeds ~28. '(широко)' dropped (23 chars). The broad/general sense is implied by having two verbs (physical + figurative pivot); must_distinguish vs 回头/拐弯 still holds.
en=30 exceeds ~28. '; convert' dropped (21 chars). 'switch modes/channels' is the defining technical/reversible sense that separates 转换 from 转化; 'convert' was redundant.
ru=31 en=30 both exceed ~28. '(сч. тур)' → '(сч.)' and '(cl. round)' → '(cl.)' (27/24). No must_distinguish so no distinction risk.

ru=34 exceeds ~28. 'нейтр., любое напр.' → 'нейтр.' (21). 'neutral' is the key marker separating 返回 from directional 回来 (toward speaker) and literary 归; detail 'любое напр.' is redundant given 'нейтр.'.
en=33 exceeds ~28. '/narrative' dropped (23). 'written' still contrasts with 这时候 (colloquial spoken), preserving the register distinction.
ru=31 exceeds ~28. '(направление)' dropped (17). 'сюда' (= this way/hither) is itself directional and is sufficient to contrast with 这里 (neutral location).
ru=30 en=30 both exceed ~28. 'напр.' removed from ru (24); 'complement' → 'compl.' in en (26). Register marker (разг.) and complement label preserved for must_distinguish vs formal 进入.
en=33 exceeds ~28. '(phys. or abstract)' → '(general)' (23). 'general' still signals the broad sense distinguishing 连接 from 衔接 (smooth join) and 链接 (hyperlink).
ru=32 en=29 both exceed ~28. 'опоздать' and 'arrive late' dropped; the inline ≠ notation pointing to 迟到 is itself sufficient to show the distinction, per must_distinguish.
ru=33 en=31 both exceed ~28. 'прав' dropped from ru (28); 'ownership' dropped from en (21). 'без передачи'/'no transfer' still contrasts with 交给 (handover of duty/ownership).
en=29 exceeds ~28. 'correspondence' → 'correspond' (25). Meaning unchanged; no must_distinguish.
en=30 exceeds ~28. 'chance, coll.' rephrased to 'by chance' (24). Chance/informal sense preserved; colloquial register is signalled by ru '(разг.)', so en need not duplicate it.
ru=29 exceeds ~28. 'направление' → 'направл.' (26). Directional nuance that distinguishes 那边 from neutral-location 那里 is retained.

ru=30 en=32 both exceed ~28. '不对' removed from parenthetical in both fields (ru 27, en 24). The word 'шире'/'broader' still signals the breadth advantage over 不对/失误/疏忽; the neighbours are named in must_distinguish, not needed in the gloss itself.
en=31 exceeds ~28. 'trouble' → 'row' (27). 'row' (= commotion/disturbance) preserves the trouble-making nuance needed vs 吵 (quarrel) and 嘈杂 (ambient noise).
len_en was 29 (over ~28 limit). Trimmed 'suffix' to 'sfx' to bring to 26 chars while preserving both senses.
len_en was 38, far over limit. Compressed to 25 chars. Distinction vs 校长/主任 still preserved (院-institution head).

len_en was 29 (over limit). Reordered to 29... recount: 'right after; immediately then' = r-i-g-h-t(5) space(1) a-f-t-e-r(5) ;space(2) i-m-m-e-d-i-a-t-e-l-y(11) space(1) t-h-e-n(4) = 29. Still 29. Use 'right after; immediately' = 24 chars. Keeps immediacy shade vs 不久.
len_en was 30 (over limit). Trimmed from 'separate by barrier (physical)' to 23 chars. Distinction vs 分开/分离 still clear (barrier-specific).
len_ru was 30 and len_en was 32, both over limit. Compressed to 21 and 27 chars respectively. Distinction vs 难度 (abstract level) and 困难 (general hardship) preserved.
len_en was 30 (over limit). Trimmed to 25 chars. Physical-movement shade preserved to distinguish from 接近 (which can be abstract).
len_en was 38-39 (far over limit). Trimmed to 28 chars. Distinction vs 演唱会 (vocal/singing only) still preserved by 'incl. instrumental'.
len_en was 30 (over limit). Trimmed to 26 chars. Both senses (head/chief and classifier for poems/songs) preserved.
len_ru was 30 (over limit). Trimmed to 28 chars by abbreviating 'физич.' to 'физ.' and 'морально' to 'нравств.' Both physical and moral senses preserved.
len_ru was 29 (over limit). Trimmed to 26 chars. Literary/compound sense preserved; en already carries '(in compounds)' so complementarity maintained.
